title: Introducing ICG Community Creations
summary: Welcome to the new home of The New Insane Comedy Group online. ICG Community Creations showcases our YouTube content, and will be a source of information on any future ICG projects, including open source software.

title: Universal Television Logo Bloopers 257: Stalking the Globe
summary: More madness with the Universal Television Bloopers as new faces arrive at the studio, but Seth Rollins strikes back and kidnaps the gang! New heroes arrive to save the day. Part of the ICG x G4p TV crossover story arc.

title: G4p TV's Looney Tunes Intro Bloopers 13: One Ticket to Blooperland
summary: The season finale — the gang tries to get the Looney Tunes intro correct amid chaos, while Seth Rollins and New Hades form a sinister plan. Part of the ICG x G4p TV crossover story arc.

title: Punxsutawney Today: There Goes Your Money Sale (2026)
summary: The latest Punxsutawney Today commercial — another hilarious sale that's too good (or bad) to be true. Commercial edited by @jtwc10.

title: Punxsutawney Today: Broke Down Van (2026)
summary: Someone's van broke down and needs a tow truck. Another classic Punxsutawney Today commercial. Edited by @jtwc10.

title: ICG Minis 6: Frederick's and Magmarina's Redemption
summary: The queen of the underworld and her son have quit and are seeking employment at the ICG! The Ash family reunites on the good side, but Hades is losing allies by the minute.

title: ICG Classics: Kenny Clark's Funny Signs Exit 5: Beware of Pets and Dogs
summary: A classic from Kenny Clark's Funny Signs series — Exit 5 features pet-related signs that are sure to make you laugh.

title: ICG Minis 5: The Ashes Find Romance
summary: It's a perfect match! Meanwhile, things are still not good down in Hades... there's definitely something wrong with that toy.

title: Punxsutawney Today: Valentines Day (2026, remake)
summary: A Valentine's Day special from the Punxsutawney Today commercial series. Commercial edited by @jtwc10.
